steps: Log in to your Freshsales account at https://yoursubdomain.freshsales.io
Click your profile avatar or initials in the top-right corner
Select 'Settings' or 'Go to Admin Settings' from the dropdown
Navigate to 'Personal Settings' from the left sidebar
Your API key is shown in the 'Your API Key' field
Click 'Copy' to copy the key to your clipboard
Use the key in the Authorization header as: 'Token token=YOUR_API_KEY'

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Freshsales API key from Personal Settings > API Settings. Used with 'Token token=' prefix in Authorization header.

notes: The Authorization header format is 'Token token=YOUR_API_KEY' (not 'Bearer')
The base URL includes your Freshsales subdomain: https://yoursubdomain.freshsales.io/api
Resetting the key disconnects all integrations using the previous key
Freshsales offers a free plan (Growth) with basic CRM features and API access
The API key is user-scoped — permissions match the user's CRM role
Freshsales is now part of Freshworks CRM (also called Freshworks Sales Cloud)

test_endpoint.description: List contacts from the default view. Requires your subdomain in the base URL.
